rows.label: bf04260100_0010
rows.name:
So something like that happened, mo.
But good that misunderstanding cleared.

rows.label: bf04260100_0020
rows.name:
Anyway, we'll see if we can track
Kiku down somehow ourselves.

rows.label: bf04260100_0030
rows.name: I too will see if I can find any leads.

rows.label: bf04260100_0040
rows.name:
No matter what, Muimui and friends
will find Professor Tatezo!
